description: This is a Flutter app main file defining the app's entry point and main widget structure, including a simple home page with a message and progress indicator.

classes.name: MyApp
classes.description: Main application widget that sets up the MaterialApp with theme and home page.

classes.name: MyHomePage
classes.description: Stateful widget representing the home screen with a title.

classes.name: _MyHomePageState
classes.description: State class for MyHomePage, builds the UI layout with an AppBar and centered messages.

methods.name: main
methods.description: Entry point of the app, runs the MyApp widget.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Builds the widget tree for MyApp, MyHomePage, and _MyHomePageState.

methods.name: createState
methods.description: Creates the mutable state for MyHomePage widget.
